item1.title: Welcome to the app
item1.body: CBH Youth Online is a place to connect, share, and grow for students of Chuyên Biên Hòa High School.

item2.title: Never miss an update
item2.body: Stay up to date with the latest school and club events. Share knowledge, study materials, and experience from older classes.

item3.title: A new solution for student leaders
item3.body: Submit class and individual violation reports easily right from your phone, without paper forms.

item4.title: And many more features...
item4.body: Explore them yourself. We hope you have a great experience.

about.title: About
about.schoolDesc1: Chuyên Biên Hòa High School, in Ninh Binh province, with more than 60 years of growth, is a leading school for advanced academic training and holistic student development.
about.schoolDesc2: The school is proud of its many awards, outstanding achievements, and a modern educational model that integrates life skills.
about.historyDesc: Founded in 1959, it was the first high school in the former Ha Nam province. It has earned many noble Labor and Independence Orders. Notably, it achieved more than 60 national olympiad awards in 2023-2024.
about.activitiesDesc: More than 20 diverse clubs: Dance, MC, IT, STEM... Building soft skills and creativity for students. A friendly, dynamic, and creative learning environment.
about.goals1: Develop intelligence, skills, and character comprehensively.
about.goals2: Spark a passion for learning and exploration.
about.goals3: Build a solid foundation for the future of students.
about.appDesc1: CBH Youth Online is an application that helps students and teachers of Chuyên Biên Hòa High School communicate and learn more easily and effectively.
about.appDesc2: Managed by students and alumni, it operates independently and is not directly managed by the school.
about.feature1Desc: Stay up to date with the latest school and club events. Share knowledge, study materials, and experience from older classes.
about.feature2Title: A new solution for student leaders
about.feature2Desc: Submit class and individual violation reports easily right from your mobile device, without paper forms.
about.feature3Desc: Explore them yourself. We hope you have a great experience.
about.copyright: © 2025 Fatties Software Education Solutions Co., Ltd. - Built by students, for students.

terms.intro: Welcome to the Chuyên Biên Hòa student forum. By accessing and using the forum, you agree to comply with the terms below. Please read them carefully before using our services.
terms.s1Text1: Registering an account or using the forum implies that you have read, understood, and agreed to comply with these Terms.
terms.s1Text2: If you do not agree, please do not use the forum.
terms.s2Text1: • You must provide accurate information when registering an account.
terms.s2Text2: • You are responsible for securing your password and all activities under your account.
terms.s2Text3: • You must not use another person's account or share your account with multiple users.
terms.s3Text1: • You retain ownership of the content you create (posts, comments, images, documents).
terms.s3Text2: • By posting, you agree to allow the forum to store, display, and share this content within the community.
terms.s3Text3: • You must not post illegal, offensive, violent, hateful, harassing, or copyright-infringing content.
terms.s4Text1: • Respect other members, do not make personal attacks, and do not cause division.
terms.s4Text2: • No spamming, advertising, or distributing viruses/malware.
terms.s4Text3: • Do not impersonate teachers, other students, or the Administration.
terms.s4Text4: • Keep discussions and sharing constructive and appropriate for school culture.
terms.s5Text1: • The Administration reserves the right to moderate, edit, delete posts, and suspend or delete accounts if violations are found.
terms.s5Text2: • The forum is not responsible for member-posted content, but will cooperate to resolve complaints.
terms.s5Text3: • We may suspend or terminate services at any time for maintenance, technical, or legal reasons.
terms.s6Text1: • The collection and use of your personal data is governed by the Privacy Policy.
terms.s6Text2: • By using the forum, you agree that your data may be processed in accordance with that policy.
terms.s7Text1: • You are solely responsible for the content you post and your behavior on the forum.
terms.s7Text2: • You agree to indemnify the forum and related parties if your actions cause damage, violate the law, or infringe on others' rights.
terms.s8Text1: • These terms can be modified or updated at any time.
terms.s8Text2: • Notifications will be posted publicly, and continued use of the forum implies acceptance of the new terms.
terms.s9Text1: If you have questions or requests regarding the Terms of Service, please contact:
terms.s9Text2: Chuyên Biên Hòa Student Forum Administration

privacy.intro: The Chuyên Biên Hòa student forum is committed to protecting the privacy and personal information of all its members. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your data when you access and use the forum.
privacy.s1Text1: When you use the forum, we may collect the following types of information:
privacy.s1Text2: • Account Information: including username, password, email address, and phone number (if provided).
privacy.s1Text3: • Personal Information: such as full name, school class, academic year, avatar, or any data you actively share in your profile.
privacy.s1Text4: • Activity Data: post history, comments, likes, violation reports, and private messages between members.
privacy.s1Text5: • Technical Information: IP address, device type, operating system, browser, cookies, and access log data.
privacy.s2Text1: Your personal information is used for the following purposes:
privacy.s2Text3: • Verify identity, manage accounts, and recover passwords.
privacy.s2Text4: • Improve user experience and suggest relevant content.
privacy.s2Text5: • Maintain security, detect and prevent fraud, spam, or violations.
privacy.s2Text6: • Contact you when necessary (system notifications, support responses, policy updates).
privacy.s3Text1: We do not sell or trade your personal information to third parties for commercial purposes. However, information may be shared in the following cases:
privacy.s3Text2: • Under legal requirements, authorities, or when ordered by a competent court.
privacy.s3Text3: • When necessary to protect the legal rights of the Forum, other members, or the community.
privacy.s3Text4: • With technical partners (e.g. hosting, security, data analysis services) to maintain forum operations.
privacy.s4Text1: • Your data is stored on server systems secured by technical safeguards such as firewalls, encryption, and access controls.
privacy.s4Text2: • Your password is encrypted; no one – including administrators – can view it directly.
privacy.s4Text3: • Although we strive for security, no system is completely secure. Users should protect their accounts by keeping passwords confidential and logging out after use.
privacy.s5Text2: • View, edit, and update personal information in your profile.
privacy.s5Text3: • Request the deletion of your account or personal data (except data required to be kept by law or to resolve disputes).
privacy.s5Text4: • Decide the visibility of your information on the forum (e.g. who can view your profile, posts, messages).
privacy.s6Text1: • The forum may use cookies to store login details, remember preferences, and analyze user behavior.
privacy.s6Text2: • You can disable cookies in your browser settings, but it may affect your user experience.
privacy.s7Text1: • The forum is aimed at high school students, so we pay special attention to the privacy of users under 18.
privacy.s7Text2: • Parents or teachers can contact us to request assistance in managing student accounts if needed.
privacy.s8Text1: • This policy may be updated at any time to align with changes in law, technology, or forum operations.
privacy.s8Text2: • Any material changes will be announced on the home page or via email prior to implementation.
privacy.s8Text3: • Continued use of the forum after updates implies acceptance of the new policy.
privacy.s9Text1: If you have questions or requests regarding your privacy, please contact:
privacy.s9Text2: Chuyên Biên Hòa Student Forum Administration
